item.title: Random Hump Day Dump-day
item.description:
Keeps me up at night
Same energy
I want to know too
Memento Mori
It me!
Obvi.
That Afroman’s song comes to mind LOL
OMG
My kid every morning before getting ready for school
Fact
Ninjas. At least one dressed like one.
Cats tax! Raj in all his grumpy splendor
Luna’s waning gibbous
Fluffy butt wants them belly rubs. Floof.
Waiting for them birbs Last but not least, Be kind to yourselves. You’re worth it! Peace & Love
item.dc:creator: Gryffuah

item.title: The Onion be posting better news than mainstream media
item.description: Midterm elections are happening. Remember to call your congresspeople and tell them you want gun legislation NOW! 19 mass shooting in seven days. Let that sink in. Republicans are not our friends, they don’t care, and will never give a flipping duck about us. Edit: enough is enough! Every single Republican or Democrat standing in the way of gun legislation has failed their constituents and is therefore a traitor for failing to do the very job they were sworn to uphold. “Shootings unfolding simultaneously right now in America: At a hospital in Tulsa, Oklahoma; a Walmart in Pittson, Pennsylvania; and a high school in Los Angeles, California.” Source: https://twitter.com/shannonrwatts/status/1532142237517107200?s=21&t=NehiP0VpzR_mk--27NhYgw
item.dc:creator: Gryffuah

item.title: I bet she uses pronouns, too
item.dc:creator: partyspooper

item.title: My painting displayed at a hobby shop!
item.description:
Pretty cool milestone for me as an artist. I now have my work displayed in our local hobby shop that holds huge Warhammer 40k tournaments. I’ve not put my work out there too much in public settings, but this is pretty cool to see when I walk in the shop. The scene was painted with the approval of the Skyrim concept artist, Darek Zabrocki. He is an absolutely incredible digital artist.
Most viral edit!? I post a lot of my stuff here, but if you do have Instagram, feel free to follow along a little closer at www.instagram.com/paintings_by_adam_stevens As always, I appreciate the Imgur community’s support on all of my artwork the past few years. Thanks so much.
item.dc:creator: PilotBuilder

item.title: In honor of Pride: Celebrities supporting their trans family members
item.description:
The Mandalorian himself, Pedro Pascal, with his sister Lux. In regards to supporting family members, all I can say is: “This is the way”
The Scream Queen herself, Jamie Lee Curtis, with her daughter Ruby. Jamie’s been a lovely and supportive mom and even officiated her daughter’s wedding!
Here’s Charlize Theron with her daughters, on the left is Jackson, who came out when she was just 3 years old. Witness!
Last we have Colin Mochrie, with his daughter Kylie. Colin’s been very outspoken in his support of Kylie. Remember: Support from your family and friends means a lot. ?️‍⚧️
item.dc:creator: GabbiTheSwedishNerdGirl

item.dc:creator: Mech0T1

item.title: I feel like I failed my mom
item.description: My moms died last week. She was fine in the morning and then couldn't even stand or talk in the after noon. I spent all week working on what I was going to say for her eulogy. I pored everything I had into it, I needed to do this. For my mom, for myself. I couldn't even get through the first sentence without breaking down. I feel like I've failed my mom for not doing enough in life. I cant live with myself for failing her again.
item.dc:creator: usiris

item.title: Recording comes out from Uvalde school shooting that indicates a cop might have shot a child.
item.description: https://www.cnn.com/videos/us/2022/05/31/radio-call-video-child-says-i-got-shot-valencia-newsroom-vpx.cnn https://twitter.com/donlew87/status/1531967491852976130?s=21&t=II00fzxy4pPQw19tB88AlQ Facebook live feed recording of CBP radio documents a kid saying he/she got shot and CBP agents saying “they shot a kid”.
